Introduction
    The story focuses on Visually impaired but nonetheless lethal bounty hunter Cheng Xiazi who happened upon the assaulted Ni Yan, the lone survivor of a brutal massacre that claimed her whole family.

Also known as: Eye for an Eye: The Blind Swordsman
